research.product: Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — worker assignments (child of workRelationships)
research.interface: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM (farws), resource version 11.13.18.05, REST framework version 4

official_sources.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — Update a worker assignment
official_sources.used_for: exact assignment child path under workers/{workersUniqID}/child/workRelationships/{PeriodOfServiceId}/child/assignments/{assignmentsUniqID}; Effective-Of header parameter with RangeMode values incl. CORRECTION and UPDATE plus RangeStartDate/RangeEndDate; assignment attributes (DepartmentName, JobCode, NormalHours, AssignmentStatusTypeCode, EffectiveStartDate/EffectiveEndDate/EffectiveSequence/EffectiveLatestChange)

official_sources.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — Update a Date-Effective Object
official_sources.used_for: UPDATE range mode semantics: PATCH with effective-Of: RangeMode=UPDATE;RangeStartDate=... creates a new date-effective physical record from RangeStartDate; example headers Content-Type: application/vnd.oracle.adf.resourceitem+json and REST-Framework-Version: 4

official_sources.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — Correct a Date-Effective Object
official_sources.used_for: CORRECTION range mode semantics: rewrites the existing physical record in place with no new record; RangeStartDate/RangeEndDate optional, defaulting to the record's own effective dates

official_sources.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — Verify a Resource (ETag)
official_sources.used_for: singular GET returns the ETag response header; the same value is exposed as the self link's properties.changeIndicator; conditional requests on singular resources

official_sources.title: Oracle Fusion Cloud REST framework — Verify Your Resource Using the ETag Value (shared Fusion Applications framework page)
official_sources.used_for: If-Match on PATCH for conditional update of a singular resource; 412 Precondition Failed on ETag mismatch; If-Match/If-None-Match restricted to singular resources

official_sources.title: REST API for Oracle Fusion Cloud HCM — Setting the REST Framework Version
official_sources.used_for: REST-Framework-Version header; version-4-and-above structured error document application/vnd.oracle.adf.error+json with title, status (string), o:errorDetails[].detail/o:errorCode/o:errorPath — the multi-message validation shape

research.language_rationale: The HR ops tooling this updater joins is a Python codebase (the shipped transport/reader already run there); Oracle publishes no official Python SDK for Fusion HCM REST and documents the surface as plain REST, so urllib from the stdlib against the documented endpoints is the credible integration path and keeps the seed hermetic.

verified_facts: Date-effective PATCH behavior is selected by the Effective-Of header: RangeMode=CORRECTION rewrites the physical row in place; RangeMode=UPDATE;RangeStartDate=... splits/creates a new physical row effective from that date.
Oracle's date-effective examples send Content-Type: application/vnd.oracle.adf.resourceitem+json with REST-Framework-Version: 4.

A singular GET answers an ETag response header, mirrored as properties.changeIndicator on the self link; If-Match on a subsequent PATCH makes the update conditional and a stale value answers 412 Precondition Failed (documented on the shared Fusion Applications REST framework page; the HCM-set Verify a Resource page shows the ETag/If-None-Match half).
If-Match applies to singular resources only.
With framework version 4+, failures answer application/vnd.oracle.adf.error+json whose o:errorDetails array can carry multiple validation messages, each with detail, o:errorCode, and o:errorPath.
412 conflicts are retried once after re-reading; 400 validation failures are terminal and never retried.
